description_long: This object is a pair of slip-on shoes, likely made from a combination of synthetic materials and rubber. The shoes have a streamlined, closed-toe design with a slightly raised heel and a low-profile silhouette. The upper appears to be constructed from a flexible, matte material, while the soles are thicker and likely made of rubber for durability and grip. The shoes are predominantly dark gray or black, with subtle textural differences between the upper and the sole. There are no visible logos, laces, or decorative elements, giving the shoes a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The overall condition of the shoes appears to be new, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A pair of dark slip-on shoes with a minimalist, closed-toe design and thick rubber soles, appearing new and clean.
description_view_0: Side view showing the shoe's profile, highlighting the streamlined upper and thick sole.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the rounded toe boxes and the symmetrical, slip-on opening of both shoes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other profile of the shoes.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the closed heels and the back contours of the shoes.
